command: printf 'ubuntu_version='; lsb_release -rs 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash ]; then source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash; echo humble_setup=present; echo ros_distro=${ROS_DISTRO:-missing}; else echo humble_setup=missing; echo ros_distro=missing; fi; printf 'python_version='; python3 --version 2>/dev/null || true

note: Native AS2FM TtV is executed inside WSL only when /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash exists. The local native AS2FM TtV records remain the working fallback on this machine.
